title: Environment Variables & Configuration Docs
summary: Environment variables verified. All three documented vars (CKVD_LOG_LEVEL, CKVD_ENABLE_CACHE, CKVD_USE_POLARS_OUTPUT) are used in code and functional. Found documentation inconsistency: Root CLAUDE.md says CKVD_USE_POLARS_OUTPUT default is "false" but actual code default is True (see config.py: "Default: True (v2.1.0+)"). CKVD_LOG_LEVEL default is ERROR, CKVD_ENABLE_CACHE default is true (handled at CryptoKlineVisionData level, not FeatureFlags).

tests: Verified CKVD_LOG_LEVEL, CKVD_ENABLE_CACHE, CKVD_USE_POLARS_OUTPUT environment variables in code
